---
title: "RNA_DGE_Interactions_NoD5"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-07"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	dev = c("png","pdf")
)
```

```{r Setting the Enviroment}

#loading libraries
library("tidyverse")
library("readxl")
library("readr")
library("ggrepel")
library("ggfortify")
library("patchwork")
library("eulerr")
library("org.Hs.eg.db")
library("AnnotationDbi")
library("ggVennDiagram")
library("ggrastr")
library("edgeR")
library("limma")
library("ggsignif")
library("dplyr")
library("purrr")
library("ggplot2")
library("tidyr")

RNA_Metadata_NoD5 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/RNA_Metatdata_No5.RDS")
Filt_RMG0_RNA_fc_NoD5 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_RMG0_RNA_fc_NoD5.RDS")
Filt_RMG0_RNA_log2cpm_NoD5 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_RMG0_RNA_log2cpm_NoD5.RDS")
chdgene_table <- readRDS("data/DGE/chdgene_table.RDS")

#Loading R Objects from this WorflowR
dge <- readRDS("data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/RNA_dge_matrix.RDS")
design_int <- readRDS("data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/design_int.RDS")
fit <- readRDS("data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/fit.RDS")
fit2 <- readRDS("data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/fit2.RDS")
TopTable_RNA_All <- readRDS("data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/TopTable_RNA_All.RDS")
Comparison_names <- readRDS("data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/Comparison_names.RDS")
RNA_sets <- readRDS("data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/RNA_sets.RDS")
# # RNA_sets0.1 <- readRDS("data/DGE/Trajectory/NoD5/RNA_DEG_Non_DEG_sets_0.1.RDS")
# # all_genes <- readRDS("data/DGE/Trajectory/NoD5/all_genes.RDS")

```

```{r Volcano_Plot_Function,Result="Hide",warning=FALSE, include = FALSE}
generate_volcano_plot <- function(toptable, title) {
  
  # #check for entrezid 
  # if(!"Entrez_ID" %in% colnames(toptable)) stop("Entrez_ID col not present")
  # 
  #make significance labels
  
  toptable <- toptable %>% 
    mutate(Significance = case_when(
      logFC > 0 & adj.P.Val < 0.05 ~ "Upregulated",
      logFC < 0 & adj.P.Val < 0.05 ~ "Downregulated",
      TRUE  ~ "Not Significant"
    ))
  
  #factor significance
  toptable$Significance <- factor(
    toptable$Significance, 
    levels = c("Upregulated", 
               "Not Significant", 
               "Downregulated")
  )
  
  #count genes in each category
  upgenes <- sum(toptable$Significance == "Upregulated")
  nsgenes <- sum(toptable$Significance == "Not Significant")
  downgenes <- sum(toptable$Significance == "Downregulated")
  
  
  #labels for legend
  legend_lab <- c(
    paste0("Upregulated: ", upgenes),
    paste0("Not Significant: ", nsgenes),
    paste0("Downregulated: ", downgenes)
  )
  
  #colors 
  color_map <- c("Upregulated" = "blue",
                 "Not Significant" = "grey30",
                 "Downregulated" = "red")
  
  #generate volcano plots
  p <- ggplot(toptable, aes(x = logFC, 
                            y = -log10(P.Value),
                            color = Significance)) +
    geom_point_rast(alpha = 0.8, size = 3) +
    scale_color_manual(values = color_map, 
                       labels = legend_lab,
                       breaks = c("Upregulated",
                                  "Not Significant", 
                                  "Downregulated"))  +
    xlim(-20,20) +
    labs(title = title, 
         x = expression("log"[2]*"FC"),
         y = expression("-log"[10]*"p-value")) +
    # theme_custom() +
    theme(legend.position = "right")
  
  return(p)
}


```

```{r FC_Plot_Function, include = FALSE}
plot_cluster_fc <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {
  
  # Filter TopTable for the genes in this cluster
  df <- top_table %>% dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels =c(
      "H2_H0","H4_H2","H15_H4","H30_H15","C2_C0","C4_C2","C15_C4","C30_C15","All_Genes","All_DEGs"
    )))
  
  # Optional: print dimensions and unique genes
  cat(cluster_name, ":", dim(df)[1], "rows,", length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")
  
  # Create boxplot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = logFC)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Comparisons")) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("logFC") +
    ggtitle(paste0(cluster_name, " RNA FC Comparisons")) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.5), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15, colour = "black"),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#CAD899"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, colour = "white", angle = 15),
      strip.text.x = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black", face = "bold")
    )
  
  return(p)
}
```

```{r FC_Plot_Function_sig, include = FALSE}
plot_cluster_fc_sig <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "H_Day02","H_Day24","H_Day415","H_Day1530","C_Day02","C_Day24","C_Day415","C_Day1530"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # Global test across comparisons
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)
  
  pw_kw <-pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$logFC,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH")
  
  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = logFC)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("logFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " RNA FC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-2, 2)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)


}
```


```{r AbsFC_Plot_Function, include = FALSE}
plot_cluster_absfc <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {
  
  # Filter TopTable for the genes in this cluster
  df <- top_table %>% dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "H2_H0","H4_H2","H15_H4","H30_H15","C2_C0","C4_C2","C15_C4","C30_C15","All_Genes","All_DEGs"
    )))
  
  # Optional: print dimensions and unique genes
  cat(cluster_name, ":", dim(df)[1], "rows,", length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")
  
  # Create boxplot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = AbsFC)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Comparisons")) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("AbsFC") +
    ggtitle(paste0(cluster_name, " RNA AbsFC Comparisons")) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.5), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15, colour = "black"),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#CAD899"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, colour = "white", angle = 15),
      strip.text.x = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black", face = "bold")
    )
  
  return(p)
}
```

```{r AbsFC_Plot_Function_sig, include = FALSE}
plot_cluster_absfc_sig <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "H_Day02","H_Day24","H_Day415","H_Day1530","C_Day02","C_Day24","C_Day415","C_Day1530"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")
  
  # Global test across comparisons
  kw <- kruskal.test(AbsFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)
  
  pw_kw <-pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$AbsFC,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH")
  
  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = AbsFC)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("AbslogFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " RNA AbsFC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 2)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)


}
```


```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_Data}
RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep <- RNA_Metadata_NoD5 %>%
  filter(!grepl("R$",Individual))

Filt_RMG0_RNA_fc_NoD5_NoRep <- Filt_RMG0_RNA_fc_NoD5 %>%
  dplyr::select(-(contains("R")))

RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep$dgelist <- c(rep(c("Human_Day0","Human_Day2","Human_Day4","Human_Day15","Human_Day30","Chimp_Day0","Chimp_Day2","Chimp_Day4","Chimp_Day15","Chimp_Day30"),7))

#create DGEList object
dge <- DGEList(counts = Filt_RMG0_RNA_fc_NoD5_NoRep)
dge$samples$group <- factor(RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep$dgelist)
dge <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")
dge$samples

dim(dge)
# saveRDS(dge, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/RNA_dge_matrix.RDS")
dge$samples

```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_Data_Model}
RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep$Species <- factor(
  RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep$Species,
  levels = c("C", "H")   # Chimp baseline
)

RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep$Timepoint <- factor(
  RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep$Timepoint,
  levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day15","Day30")
)

design_int <- model.matrix(~ Species * Timepoint,
                           data = RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep)

colnames(design_int)
colnames(design_int) <- make.names(colnames(design_int))

# saveRDS(design_int, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/design_int.RDS")
```


```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_Data_Model}
# Step 1: voom first
v1 <- voom(dge, design_int, plot = TRUE)

# Step 2: estimate duplicate correlation on voom-transformed data
corfit <- duplicateCorrelation(v1, design_int, block = RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep$Individual)
corfit.correlation <- corfit$consensus.correlation

# Step 3: voom again including correlation
v2 <- voom(dge, design_int, plot = TRUE,
           block = RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep$Individual,
           correlation = corfit.correlation)

# Step 4: fit linear model
fit <- lmFit(v2, design_int, block = RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep$Individual, correlation = corfit.correlation)
fit <- eBayes(fit)

pal <- rainbow(length(unique(RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep$Timepoint)))
day <- RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep$Timepoint

plotDensities(v2, col = pal[as.numeric(day)], legend = FALSE)

# saveRDS(fit, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/fit.RDS")
```


```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_Data_Model}
contrast_matrix <- makeContrasts(

  # Species differences
  HvC_Day0  = SpeciesH,
  HvC_Day2  = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  HvC_Day4  = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay4,
  HvC_Day15 = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay15,
  HvC_Day30 = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay30,
  
  #Trajectory differences
  H_Day02 = TimepointDay2 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  H_Day24 = TimepointDay4 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay4 - TimepointDay2 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  H_Day415 = TimepointDay15 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay15 - TimepointDay4 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay4,
  H_Day1530 = TimepointDay30 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay30 - TimepointDay15 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay15,
  C_Day02 = TimepointDay2,
  C_Day24 = TimepointDay4 - TimepointDay2,
  C_Day415 = TimepointDay15 - TimepointDay4,
  C_Day1530 = TimepointDay30 - TimepointDay15,
  
  # True interaction tests trajectory
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj24 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay4 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj415 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay15 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay4,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay30 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay15,
  
  levels = design_int
)

fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast_matrix)
fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)

plotSA(fit2, main = "RNA Model")

results_summary <- decideTests(fit2,
                               adjust.method = "BH",
                               p.value = 0.05)
summary(results_summary)

# saveRDS(fit2, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/fit2.RDS")
```


```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_TopTable}
#Create Human TopTable. using listapply, then you can pull specific comp using the $
TopTables_RNA_names <- colnames(fit2$coefficients) 

# colnames(fit2$coefficients)

TopTable_RNA_All <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(TopTables_RNA_names,function(ct) {
    
    tt <- topTable(
      fit2,
      coef = ct,
      number = Inf,
      sort.by = "p"
    )
    
    #add identifiers
    tt$Gene <- rownames(tt)
    tt$Comparisons <- ct
    
    tt
  })
)

Comparison_names <- unique(TopTable_RNA_All$Comparisons)

# saveRDS(TopTable_RNA_All, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/TopTable_RNA_All.RDS")
# saveRDS(Comparison_names, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/Comparison_names.RDS")

head(TopTable_RNA_All)
```


```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_TopTable_VolcancoPlots}

# Calculate global axis limits
x_limits <- range(TopTable_RNA_All$logFC, na.rm = TRUE)
y_limits <- range(-log10(TopTable_RNA_All$P.Value), na.rm = TRUE)

plot <- list()

for (n in Comparison_names) {
  data_n <- TopTable_RNA_All %>% 
    dplyr::filter(Comparisons == n)
  
  plot[[n]] <- generate_volcano_plot(data_n, n) +
    ggplot2::xlim(x_limits) +
    ggplot2::ylim(y_limits)
}

# Print plots
for (n in Comparison_names) {
  print(plot[[n]])
}
```
```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_TopTable_Subsetting0.05}
RNA_sets <- map(
  Comparison_names,
  ~ {
    df <- TopTable_RNA_All %>%
      filter(Comparisons == paste0(.x))

    list(
      DEGs = df %>% filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05),
      NonDEGs = df %>% filter(adj.P.Val >= 0.05)
    )
  }
)


names(RNA_sets) <- paste0(Comparison_names)

# saveRDS(RNA_sets, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/RNA_sets.RDS")
```

```{r}

TopTable_RNA_All_TrajectoryFC <- TopTable_RNA_All %>% 
  filter(Comparisons == c("H_Day02","H_Day24","H_Day415","H_Day1530","C_Day02","C_Day24","C_Day415","C_Day1530"))

Inter_02_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_24_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj24$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_415_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj415$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_1530_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530$DEGs$Gene)

cluster_lists <- list(
  Inter_02_genes  = Inter_02_genes,
  Inter_24_genes  = Inter_24_genes,
  Inter_415_genes  = Inter_415_genes,
  Inter_1530_genes  = Inter_1530_genes
)

cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_fc_sig(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_RNA_All_TrajectoryFC)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)
```


```{r}
TopTable_RNA_All$AbsFC <- abs(TopTable_RNA_All$logFC)

TopTable_RNA_All_TrajectoryFC <- TopTable_RNA_All %>% 
  filter(Comparisons == c("H_Day02","H_Day24","H_Day415","H_Day1530","C_Day02","C_Day24","C_Day415","C_Day1530"))

Inter_02_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_24_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj24$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_415_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj415$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_1530_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530$DEGs$Gene)

cluster_lists <- list(
  Inter_02_genes  = Inter_02_genes,
  Inter_24_genes  = Inter_24_genes,
  Inter_415_genes  = Inter_415_genes,
  Inter_1530_genes  = Inter_1530_genes
)

cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_absfc_sig(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_RNA_All_TrajectoryFC)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)

```


```{r }

make_cardiac_table <- function(fit, coef_name) {

  library(limma)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tibble)
  library(clusterProfiler)
  library(org.Hs.eg.db)
  library(AnnotationDbi)

  # -----------------------------
  # 1. Differential expression
  # -----------------------------
  de <- topTable(fit, coef = coef_name, number = Inf) %>%
    rownames_to_column("ENSEMBL") %>%
    mutate(ENSEMBL = sub("\\..*", "", ENSEMBL))

  # -----------------------------
  # 2. Add gene symbols (HGNC)
  # -----------------------------
  symbol_map <- AnnotationDbi::select(
    org.Hs.eg.db,
    keys = unique(de$ENSEMBL),
    keytype = "ENSEMBL",
    columns = c("SYMBOL")
  )

  de <- de %>%
    left_join(symbol_map, by = "ENSEMBL")

  # Fill missing symbols safely
  de$SYMBOL[is.na(de$SYMBOL)] <- de$ENSEMBL[is.na(de$SYMBOL)]

  # -----------------------------
  # 3. Filter genes for GO input (QC step)
  # -----------------------------
  sig_genes <- de %>%
    filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05 & abs(logFC) > 0.5) %>%
    pull(ENSEMBL)

  if (length(sig_genes) < 10) {
    warning("Too few significant genes for GO enrichment")
  }

  # -----------------------------
  # 4. GO enrichment
  # -----------------------------
  background_genes <- de$ENSEMBL
  
  ego <- enrichGO(
  gene     = sig_genes,
  universe = background_genes,
  OrgDb    = org.Hs.eg.db,
  keyType  = "ENSEMBL",
  ont      = "BP",
  readable = FALSE
)

  go_table <- ego@result

  # -----------------------------
  # 5. Handle empty GO results safely
  # -----------------------------
  if (is.null(go_table) || nrow(go_table) == 0) {

    cardiac_go <- go_table
    cardiac_genes <- character(0)

  } else {

    cardiac_go <- go_table %>%
      filter(grepl(
        "heart|cardiac|cardiac muscle|cardiac chamber|cardiac septum|cardiovascular",
        Description,
        ignore.case = TRUE
      ))

    cardiac_genes <- unique(
      sub("\\..*", "",
          unlist(strsplit(cardiac_go$geneID, "/")))
    )
  }

  # -----------------------------
  # 6. Score genes
  # -----------------------------
  de <- de %>%
    mutate(score = ifelse(ENSEMBL %in% cardiac_genes, 1, 0))

  # -----------------------------
  # 7. Cardiac category system
  # -----------------------------
  de <- de %>%
    mutate(category = case_when(
      score == 1 & adj.P.Val < 0.05 & abs(logFC) > 1 ~ "Strong cardiac",
      score == 1 & (adj.P.Val < 0.05 | abs(logFC) > 0.5) ~ "Moderate cardiac",
      score == 1 ~ "Weak cardiac",
      TRUE ~ "None"
    ))

gene_go_map <- cardiac_go %>%
  dplyr::select(Description, geneID) %>%
  tidyr::separate_rows(geneID, sep = "/") %>%
  group_by(geneID) %>%
  summarise(GO_terms = paste(unique(Description), collapse = "; "), .groups = "drop")

de <- de %>%
  mutate(score_rank = -log10(pmax(adj.P.Val, 1e-300)) * abs(logFC)) %>%
  arrange(desc(score_rank)) %>%
  mutate(Rank = row_number())

  # -----------------------------
  # 8. Ranking (biological relevance score)
  # -----------------------------
  de <- de %>%
    mutate(score_rank = -log10(pmax(adj.P.Val, 1e-300)) * abs(logFC)) %>%
    arrange(desc(score_rank)) %>%
    mutate(Rank = row_number())

  # -----------------------------
  # 9. Final table (NOW INCLUDES SYMBOL)
  # -----------------------------
  final_table <- de %>%
    dplyr::select(Rank, ENSEMBL, SYMBOL, logFC, adj.P.Val, category)

final_table <- de %>%
  dplyr::select(Rank, ENSEMBL, SYMBOL, logFC, adj.P.Val, category) %>%
  left_join(gene_go_map, by = c("ENSEMBL" = "geneID"))

  # -----------------------------
  # 10. QC summary
  # -----------------------------
  qc <- list(
    n_sig_genes = length(sig_genes),
    n_go_terms = nrow(go_table),
    n_cardiac_terms = nrow(cardiac_go),
    n_cardiac_genes = length(cardiac_genes)
  )

  # -----------------------------
  # 11. Return everything
  # -----------------------------
  return(list(
    table = final_table,
    go = go_table,
    cardiac_go = cardiac_go,
    cardiac_genes = cardiac_genes,
    ego = ego,
    qc = qc
  ))
}
```

```{r}
resH02 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "H_Day02")

final_tableH02 <- resH02$table
go_tableH02 <- resH02$go
cardiac_goH02 <- resH02$cardiac_go

enriched_termsH02 <- go_tableH02 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_termsH02 <- cardiac_goH02

final_tableH02_StrongCardiac <- final_tableH02 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_tableH02_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_tableH02_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
resH24 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "H_Day24")

final_tableH24 <- resH24$table
go_tableH24 <- resH24$go
cardiac_goH24 <- resH24$cardiac_go

enriched_termsH24 <- go_tableH24 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_termsH24 <- cardiac_goH24

final_tableH24_StrongCardiac <- final_tableH24 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_tableH24_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_tableH24_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
resH415 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "H_Day415")

final_tableH415 <- resH415$table
go_tableH415 <- resH415$go
cardiac_goH415 <- resH415$cardiac_go

enriched_termsH415 <- go_tableH415 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_termsH415 <- cardiac_goH415

final_tableH415_StrongCardiac <- final_tableH415 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_tableH415_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_tableH415_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
resH1530 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "H_Day1530")

final_tableH1530 <- resH1530$table
go_tableH1530 <- resH1530$go
cardiac_goH1530 <- resH1530$cardiac_go

enriched_termsH1530 <- go_tableH1530 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_termsH1530 <- cardiac_goH1530

final_tableH1530_StrongCardiac <- final_tableH1530 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_tableH1530_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_tableH1530_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
resC02 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "C_Day02")

final_tableC02 <- resC02$table
go_tableC02 <- resC02$go
cardiac_goC02 <- resC02$cardiac_go

enriched_termsC02 <- go_tableC02 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_termsC02 <- cardiac_goC02

final_tableC02_StrongCardiac <- final_tableC02 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_tableC02_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_tableC02_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
resC24 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "C_Day24")

final_tableC24 <- resC24$table
go_tableC24 <- resC24$go
cardiac_goC24 <- resC24$cardiac_go

enriched_termsC24 <- go_tableC24 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_termsC24 <- cardiac_goC24

final_tableC24_StrongCardiac <- final_tableC24 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_tableC24_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_tableC24_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
resC415 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "C_Day415")

final_tableC415 <- resC415$table
go_tableC415 <- resC415$go
cardiac_goC415 <- resC415$cardiac_go

enriched_termsC415 <- go_tableC415 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_termsC415 <- cardiac_goC415

final_tableC415_StrongCardiac <- final_tableC415 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_tableC415_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_tableC415_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
resC1530 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "C_Day1530")

final_tableC1530 <- resC1530$table
go_tableC1530 <- resC1530$go
cardiac_goC1530 <- resC1530$cardiac_go

enriched_termsC1530 <- go_tableC1530 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_termsC1530 <- cardiac_goC1530

final_tableC1530_StrongCardiac <- final_tableC1530 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_tableC1530_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_tableC1530_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
resHvC0 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "HvC_Day0")

final_tableHvC0 <- resHvC0$table
go_tableHvC0 <- resHvC0$go
cardiac_goHvC0 <- resHvC0$cardiac_go

enriched_termsHvC0 <- go_tableHvC0 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_termsHvC0 <- cardiac_goHvC0

final_tableHvC0_StrongCardiac <- final_tableHvC0 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_tableHvC0_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_tableHvC0_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
resHvC2 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "HvC_Day2")

final_tableHvC2 <- resHvC2$table
go_tableHvC2 <- resHvC2$go
cardiac_goHvC2 <- resHvC2$cardiac_go

enriched_termsHvC2 <- go_tableHvC2 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_termsHvC2 <- cardiac_goHvC2

final_tableHvC2_StrongCardiac <- final_tableHvC2 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_tableHvC2_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_tableHvC2_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
resHvC4 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "HvC_Day4")

final_tableHvC4 <- resHvC4$table
go_tableHvC4 <- resHvC4$go
cardiac_goHvC4 <- resHvC4$cardiac_go

enriched_termsHvC4 <- go_tableHvC4 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_termsHvC4 <- cardiac_goHvC4

final_tableHvC4_StrongCardiac <- final_tableHvC4 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_tableHvC4_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_tableHvC4_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
resHvC15 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "HvC_Day15")

final_tableHvC15 <- resHvC15$table
go_tableHvC15 <- resHvC15$go
cardiac_goHvC15 <- resHvC15$cardiac_go

enriched_termsHvC15 <- go_tableHvC15 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_termsHvC15 <- cardiac_goHvC15

final_tableHvC15_StrongCardiac <- final_tableHvC15 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_tableHvC15_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_tableHvC15_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
resHvC30 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "HvC_Day30")

final_tableHvC30 <- resHvC30$table
go_tableHvC30 <- resHvC30$go
cardiac_goHvC30 <- resHvC30$cardiac_go

enriched_termsHvC30 <- go_tableHvC30 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_termsHvC30 <- cardiac_goHvC30

final_tableHvC30_StrongCardiac <- final_tableHvC30 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_tableHvC30_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_tableHvC30_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
res02 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02")

final_table02 <- res02$table
go_table02 <- res02$go
cardiac_go02 <- res02$cardiac_go

enriched_terms02 <- go_table02 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_terms02 <- cardiac_go02

final_table02_StrongCardiac <- final_table02 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_table02_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_table02_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
res24 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj24")

final_table24 <- res24$table
go_table24 <- res24$go
cardiac_go24 <- res24$cardiac_go

enriched_terms24 <- go_table24 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_terms24 <- cardiac_go24

final_table24_StrongCardiac <- final_table24 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_table24_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_table24_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
res415 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj415")

final_table415 <- res415$table
go_table415 <- res415$go
cardiac_go415 <- res415$cardiac_go

enriched_terms415 <- go_table415 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_terms415 <- cardiac_go415

final_table415_StrongCardiac <- final_table415 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_table415_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_table415_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
res1530 <- make_cardiac_table(fit2, "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530")

final_table1530 <- res1530$table
go_table1530 <- res1530$go
cardiac_go1530 <- res1530$cardiac_go

enriched_terms1530 <- go_table1530 %>%
  filter(p.adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

cardiac_terms1530 <- cardiac_go1530

final_table1530_StrongCardiac <- final_table1530 %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')

write.csv(final_table1530_StrongCardiac, "data/DGE/Species/concat/NoD5/final_table1530_StrongCardiac.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Interactions_Day02, fig.width = 25, fig.height= 30}
int_Traj2 <- topTable(fit2, coef="Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02",number=Inf)
top_int_Traj2 <- topTable(fit2, coef="Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02", number=200)
top_genes <- rownames(top_int_Traj2)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

expr_mat <- v2$E[top_genes, ]  # expression for top genes

plot_df <- as.data.frame(t(expr_mat))
plot_df$Sample <- rownames(plot_df)

plot_df <- cbind(plot_df, RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep)

# Make time numeric for ordering
plot_df$Time <- factor(plot_df$Cond,
                       levels=c("H_Day0","H_Day2","H_Day4","H_Day15","H_Day30",
                                "C_Day0","C_Day2","C_Day4","C_Day15","C_Day30"))

library(ggplot2)

gene_to_plot <- top_genes[1]

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x=Cond,
           y=.data[[gene_to_plot]],
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line", size=1.2) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", size=3) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title=paste("Trajectory:", gene_to_plot),
       y="log2 CPM")

plot_df$TimeOnly <- gsub("H_|C_", "", plot_df$Cond)
plot_df$TimeOnly <- factor(plot_df$TimeOnly,
                           levels=c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x=TimeOnly,
           y=.data[[gene_to_plot]],
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line", size=1.2) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", size=3) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title=paste("Interaction trajectory:", gene_to_plot),
       x="Time",
       y="log2 CPM")

plot_long <- plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols=all_of(top_genes),
               names_to="Gene",
               values_to="Expression")

ggplot(plot_long,
       aes(x=TimeOnly,
           y=Expression,
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line") +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point") +
  facet_wrap(~Gene, scales="free_y") +
  theme_classic()

print(rownames(top_int_Traj2))
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Interactions_Day24, fig.width = 25, fig.height= 30}
int_Traj4 <- topTable(fit2, coef="Sig_Sp_inter_Traj24")
top_int_Traj4 <- topTable(fit2, coef="Sig_Sp_inter_Traj24", number=200)
top_genes <- rownames(top_int_Traj4)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

expr_mat <- v2$E[top_genes, ]  # expression for top genes

plot_df <- as.data.frame(t(expr_mat))
plot_df$Sample <- rownames(plot_df)

plot_df <- cbind(plot_df, RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep)

# Make time numeric for ordering
plot_df$Time <- factor(plot_df$Cond,
                       levels=c("H_Day0","H_Day2","H_Day4","H_Day15","H_Day30",
                                "C_Day0","C_Day2","C_Day4","C_Day15","C_Day30"))

library(ggplot2)

gene_to_plot <- top_genes[1]

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x=Cond,
           y=.data[[gene_to_plot]],
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line", size=1.2) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", size=3) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title=paste("Trajectory:", gene_to_plot),
       y="log2 CPM")

plot_df$TimeOnly <- gsub("H_|C_", "", plot_df$Cond)
plot_df$TimeOnly <- factor(plot_df$TimeOnly,
                           levels=c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x=TimeOnly,
           y=.data[[gene_to_plot]],
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line", size=1.2) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", size=3) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title=paste("Interaction trajectory:", gene_to_plot),
       x="Time",
       y="log2 CPM")

plot_long <- plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols=all_of(top_genes),
               names_to="Gene",
               values_to="Expression")

ggplot(plot_long,
       aes(x=TimeOnly,
           y=Expression,
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line") +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point") +
  facet_wrap(~Gene, scales="free_y") +
  theme_classic()
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Interactions_Day15, fig.width = 25, fig.height= 30}
int_Traj15 <- topTable(fit2, coef="Sig_Sp_inter_Traj415")
top_int_Traj15 <- topTable(fit2, coef="Sig_Sp_inter_Traj415", number=200)
top_genes <- rownames(top_int_Traj15)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

expr_mat <- v2$E[top_genes, ]  # expression for top genes

plot_df <- as.data.frame(t(expr_mat))
plot_df$Sample <- rownames(plot_df)

plot_df <- cbind(plot_df, RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep)

# Make time numeric for ordering
plot_df$Time <- factor(plot_df$Cond,
                       levels=c("H_Day0","H_Day2","H_Day4","H_Day15","H_Day30",
                                "C_Day0","C_Day2","C_Day4","C_Day15","C_Day30"))

library(ggplot2)

gene_to_plot <- top_genes[1]

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x=Cond,
           y=.data[[gene_to_plot]],
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line", size=1.2) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", size=3) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title=paste("Trajectory:", gene_to_plot),
       y="log2 CPM")

plot_df$TimeOnly <- gsub("H_|C_", "", plot_df$Cond)
plot_df$TimeOnly <- factor(plot_df$TimeOnly,
                           levels=c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x=TimeOnly,
           y=.data[[gene_to_plot]],
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line", size=1.2) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", size=3) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title=paste("Interaction trajectory:", gene_to_plot),
       x="Time",
       y="log2 CPM")

plot_long <- plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols=all_of(top_genes),
               names_to="Gene",
               values_to="Expression")

ggplot(plot_long,
       aes(x=TimeOnly,
           y=Expression,
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line") +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point") +
  facet_wrap(~Gene, scales="free_y") +
  theme_classic()
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Interactions_Day30, fig.width = 25, fig.height= 30}
int_Traj30 <- topTable(fit2, coef="Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530")
top_int_Traj30 <- topTable(fit2, coef="Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530", number=200)
top_genes <- rownames(top_int_Traj30)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

expr_mat <- v2$E[top_genes, ]  # expression for top genes

plot_df <- as.data.frame(t(expr_mat))
plot_df$Sample <- rownames(plot_df)

plot_df <- cbind(plot_df, RNA_Metadata_NoD5_NoRep)

# Make time numeric for ordering
plot_df$Time <- factor(plot_df$Cond,
                       levels=c("H_Day0","H_Day2","H_Day4","H_Day15","H_Day30",
                                "C_Day0","C_Day2","C_Day4","C_Day15","C_Day30"))

library(ggplot2)

gene_to_plot <- top_genes[1]

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x=Cond,
           y=.data[[gene_to_plot]],
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line", size=1.2) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", size=3) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title=paste("Trajectory:", gene_to_plot),
       y="log2 CPM")

plot_df$TimeOnly <- gsub("H_|C_", "", plot_df$Cond)
plot_df$TimeOnly <- factor(plot_df$TimeOnly,
                           levels=c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x=TimeOnly,
           y=.data[[gene_to_plot]],
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line", size=1.2) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", size=3) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title=paste("Interaction trajectory:", gene_to_plot),
       x="Time",
       y="log2 CPM")
plot_long <- plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols=all_of(top_genes),
               names_to="Gene",
               values_to="Expression")

ggplot(plot_long,
       aes(x=TimeOnly,
           y=Expression,
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line") +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point") +
  facet_wrap(~Gene, scales="free_y") +
  theme_classic()
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Interactions_Overlaps, fig.width = 15, fig.height= 10}

# Make a copy to be safe
chdgene_table_copy <- chdgene_table
# 
# # Check
# colnames(chdgene_table_copy)
# 
# #ENSEMBL ID
# all_ensembl_ids <- unique(TopTable_RNA_All$Gene)
# 
# ensembl <- useMart(
#   "ensembl",
#   dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl"
# )
# 
# ensembl_to_hgnc <- getBM(
#   attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol"),
#   filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
#   values = all_ensembl_ids,
#   mart = ensembl
# ) %>%
#   filter(hgnc_symbol != "") %>%
#   distinct()
# 
# saveRDS(
#   ensembl_to_hgnc,
#   "data/DGE/Species/Ensembl_to_HGNC_mapping.RDS"
# )

ensembl_to_hgnc <- readRDS("data/DGE/Species/Ensembl_to_HGNC_mapping.RDS")

# Loop through my data sets to overlap
known_genes <- chdgene_table_copy$Gene

CHD_overlap_results <- list()

for (day in names(RNA_sets)) {

  message("Processing ", day)

  DEG_Set <- unique(RNA_sets[[day]]$DEGs$Gene)
  Non_DEG_Set <- unique(RNA_sets[[day]]$NonDEGs$Gene)

  # ---- DEG overlaps ----
  DEG_Overlaps_symbols <- ensembl_to_hgnc$ensembl_gene_id[
    ensembl_to_hgnc$ensembl_gene_id %in% DEG_Set &
    ensembl_to_hgnc$hgnc_symbol %in% known_genes 
  ]

  # ---- Non-DEG overlaps ----
  Non_DEG_Overlaps_symbols <- ensembl_to_hgnc$ensembl_gene_id[
    ensembl_to_hgnc$ensembl_gene_id %in% Non_DEG_Set &
    ensembl_to_hgnc$hgnc_symbol %in% known_genes
  ]

  CHD_overlap_results[[day]] <- list(
    DEG_CHD_Genes = unique(DEG_Overlaps_symbols),
    NonDEG_CHD_Genes = unique(Non_DEG_Overlaps_symbols)
  )

  saveRDS(
    unique(DEG_Overlaps_symbols),
    paste0("data/DGE/Species/", day, "_DEG_CHDGenes.RDS")
  )

  saveRDS(
    unique(Non_DEG_Overlaps_symbols),
    paste0("data/DGE/Species/", day, "_NonDEG_CHDGenes.RDS")
  )
}

```


```{r RNASeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_2_0}
H_comp <- "H_Day02"
C_comp <- "C_Day02"

df_wide <- TopTable_RNA_All %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
max_val <- max(abs(c(x_limits, y_limits)))
x_limits <- c(-15, 15)
y_limits <- c(-15, 15)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]])) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_neg,
    y = y_pos,
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  xlim(x_limits) +
  ylim(y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp)
  )

```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_2_0}
H_comp <- "H_Day24"
C_comp <- "C_Day24"

df_wide <- TopTable_RNA_All %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
max_val <- max(abs(c(x_limits, y_limits)))
x_limits <- c(-15, 15)
y_limits <- c(-15, 15)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]])) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_neg,
    y = y_pos,
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  xlim(x_limits) +
  ylim(y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp)
  )


```


```{r RNASeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_2_0}
H_comp <- "H_Day415"
C_comp <- "C_Day415"

df_wide <- TopTable_RNA_All %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
max_val <- max(abs(c(x_limits, y_limits)))
x_limits <- c(-15, 15)
y_limits <- c(-15, 15)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]])) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_neg,
    y = y_pos,
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  xlim(x_limits) +
  ylim(y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp)
  )

```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_2_0}
H_comp <- "H_Day1530"
C_comp <- "C_Day1530"

df_wide <- TopTable_RNA_All %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
max_val <- max(abs(c(x_limits, y_limits)))
x_limits <- c(-15, 15)
y_limits <- c(-15, 15)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]])) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_neg,
    y = y_pos,
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  xlim(x_limits) +
  ylim(y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp)
  )
```
